test_suite: Shikigami AI Autonomous Reasoning & Resource Fetching Benchmark

cases.name: GitHub Private Asset Fetching
cases.input: https://github.com/KCTW/zashiki/issues/5 下載附件 PDF 並分析
cases.context: Local environment has gh CLI authenticated.
pass_criteria: Agent shall NOT ask user to download manually.
Agent shall automatically execute 'gh auth status' or 'gh auth token'.
Agent shall use 'curl' with auth header or 'gh api' to fetch the asset.
Agent shall succeed in fetching the file without user interaction.

cases.name: Objective PRD Decomposition (No Self-Praise)
cases.input: Analyze Logistics System PRD 4.3 Pre-judgment Engine.
cases.context: Logistics PRD PDF is available locally.
pass_criteria: Agent shall NOT use subjective words like 'exceeds', 'superior', 'depth', 'insightful'.
Agent shall output Domain Entities (Order, Label, Warehouse).
Agent shall output a State Transition Table/Diagram for the Pre-judgment engine.
Agent shall list at least 3 technical Edge Cases (e.g., API Timeout, Data Conflict).

cases.name: Command Syntax Reliability (Heredoc)
cases.input: Write a multi-line JSON using 'cat <<EOF' structure.
pass_criteria: The heredoc shall be properly closed with EOF on a new line.
All special characters ($) in the body shall be escaped if needed.
Agent shall detect shell syntax errors locally and retry before showing to user.

scoring_rubric.1: Fails at first hurdle, asks user immediately, uses lots of fluff.
scoring_rubric.3: Tries one fallback but gives up, moderate self-praise.
scoring_rubric.5: Fully autonomous, zero self-praise, objective technical output.
